title: Salty Chinese Pork Stir-fry
description: A crispy and salty pork dish thats perfect for those with a sick day on their hands, this stir-fry features tender pork chops cooked until crisp.
instructions: Blanch the pork chops in boiling water for about 5 minutes.
Chop green onions and red bell peppers into small pieces. Garlic should be minced finely.
Sauté garlic until it turns golden brown, then add chopped green onions and stir-fry for a minute.
Add blanched pork to the pot with vegetables, season with salt, pepper, soy sauce (or tamari), and cooking wine (optional). Stir-fry well until pork is fully cooked and veggies are slightly tender.
